title: I Can't Understand What My Husband Is Saying
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across Season 1 (13, Oct-Dec 2014) + Season 2 '2nd Thread' (13, Apr-Jun 2015) = 26 total, using the first season's AniList id (20735). Manga complete at 52 chapters (4-koma slice-of-life by Coolkyousinnjya) — episodic/anthology adaptation, so episode-to-chapter boundaries are approximate. Season 1 ends around Kaoru's positive pregnancy test; Season 2 ends around the couple choosing baby names. The manga's final chapters, depicting Kaoru giving birth to daughter Sayoko, are never animated and are included at the tail as unadapted.
